body:
Hey %contact_first_name%,


Several new homes just hit the market that fit your search.
Some even have the exact features you were looking for before.



Take a look here and tell me what you think:
👉 [%custom_ylopo_listing_alert%]


If anything stands out, I can set up a showing for you this week.
subject: Re: New homes just listed in your search area, %contact_first_name%!
